rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required for the court to determine whether to grant the petition with respect to both properties or only 190 Sea Bridge, which was on hand when the general assignment was signed. counsel must prepare an bring to the hearing a revised order that has the legal descriptions of the real properties in the body of the order, not as an attachment.
